name: NC State supersonic tunnel — Config B (streamtraced Busemann inlet) conditions
description: Freestream conditions for the Schram & Narayanaswamy streamtraced-inlet unstart experiment (research plan Config B). The q contraction axis maps onto this configuration.
source: Schram & Narayanaswamy, Experiments in Fluids 67:64, 2026. doi:10.1007/s00348-026-04215-0 and companion AIAA Journal papers
status: Transcribed from the 2026 paper via external review notes (2026-07-12); verify every value against the PDF before publication-grade use.
geometry_notes: Use busemann.generate_busemann_inlet() for a parametric Busemann-family contour. The experiment used a streamtraced half-Busemann sugar-scoop inlet; obtain the measured contour/CAD before exact comparison. The 44/25.5 diameter-squared ratio is approximately the reported 3:1 contraction.
